approvalSource: Steve direct May 20 rolling Foundation Builder queue: build BRAIN-FLEET-MODEL-CAPABILITY-REGISTRY-001 immediately after Brain Fleet quota ledger and before direct Codex, Gemini, Claude, OpenClaw, or extractor route probes.

Unknown or unprobed capability, quota, and auth truth must be explicit as unknown or probe_required

Do not mutate credentials, provider config, source systems, llm_credentials, llm_routes, or llm_route_probes
